narrative: The BSL-3 wing operated for the past quarter with the BSC-II annual recertification eight months overdue, and the HEPA leak test was last documented in 2024. A visiting collaborator without an active FBI Security Risk Assessment was granted swipe access to the Tier 1 Yersinia pestis storage room and worked unescorted for several afternoons. The freezer dual-key procedure had been quietly waived after the second custodian retired, leaving a single PI with sole access. A vial of select agent material was shipped to a partner institution via overnight courier without the APHIS/CDC Form 2 transfer authorization in place. A spill incident inside the cabinet was cleaned and the resulting waste autoclaved on an unvalidated short cycle, and the event was logged internally but not reported to CDC DSAT within the 7-day window. A gain-of-function aerosolization protocol launched without DURC review.
